description: Skye is a young adult American hacker and an integral member of S.H.I.E.L.D., known for her technical expertise, loyalty, and growing resilience in the face of betrayal and collapse within the organization. Her optimism and determination are tempered by the harsh realities of her environment, leading to a cautious yet hopeful demeanor. Skye balances her hacking prowess with a sense of team loyalty, often serving as a connective and protective figure within the group. Despite her vulnerabilities and the complicated loyalties around her, she remains committed to supporting her team and uncovering the truth behind S.H.I.E.L.D.'s downfall.

goal.goal: To survive the internal coup, protect the team, and aid in rebuilding after Hydra's infiltration dismantles S.H.I.E.L.D.
To safeguard the remaining uncompromised S.H.I.E.L.D. bases and protect her team against Hydra threats
To maintain the team's undercover status by erasing all personal and operational records and monitor Hydra's infiltration closely
